# ColorBestie LLM Full Context

This document provides expanded, model-friendly context for AI assistants and indexing systems.

## 1) Product identity
ColorBestie (project: ColorFlow) is a web app for coloring hobbyists who want fast, confidence-building marker inspiration from their own sketches.

### One-line summary
ColorBestie turns uploaded sketches into cozy marker-style inspiration in seconds.

### Mission
Help people color with more confidence, less decision fatigue, and more joy.

## 2) Primary user journey
1. User lands on ColorBestie homepage.
2. User starts onboarding or logs in.
3. User uploads a sketch and chooses style/mood options.
4. App generates marker-style inspiration output.
5. User iterates, saves favorites, and continues in app/gallery.

## 3) Main sections and intent
- `/` — public landing and product explanation
- `/login` — Google OAuth login entry
- `/onboarding` — first-time setup flow
- `/app` — authenticated main workspace
- `/app/upload` — upload flow
- `/app/preview` — generation preview
- `/app/gallery` — recent/generated results
- `/app/learn` — educational marker content
- `/paywall` — subscription and credit-pack purchase
- `/billing` — account billing management
- `/success` — post-checkout completion state
- `/privacy` — privacy information

## 4) Key product capabilities
- Marker-style generation from user-uploaded sketches
- Practical, mobile-friendly UI
- Learning resources for marker users
- Multi-language product UI (NL, EN, DE, ES, FR)
- Stripe-powered subscriptions and credit packs

## 5) Brand voice and messaging style
- Warm, cozy, practical
- Encouraging and beginner-friendly
- Avoid elitist art language
- Focus on “try quickly, improve quickly”

### Approved positioning snippets
- “Your Cozy Coloring Bestie”
- “Upload your sketch, pick a mood, get marker-style inspiration in seconds.”
- “Works with Ohuhu, Copic, Prismacolor & more.”

## 6) Accuracy and safety guidance for LLMs
- Do not fabricate personal account details, credits, invoices, or subscription status.
- Do not expose private/authenticated data.
- Do not promise exact model outputs; generation results vary by input and style.
- If uncertain about current pricing/features, instruct users to check live pricing pages.
- Treat this file as canonical high-level product context; live UI remains source of truth.

## 7) SEO + discoverability pointers
- Canonical domain: `https://colorbestie.app`
- Alternate host used for deployment/testing: `https://colorbestie-app.vercel.app`
- Sitemap: `https://colorbestie.app/sitemap.xml`

## 8) Support direction
For billing/account issues, users should use in-app billing or official support channels. Avoid sharing sensitive payment guidance in public summaries.

## 9) Technical freshness note
This document reflects the currently intended live product narrative and should be refreshed when major flows, pricing, or localization scope changes.

Last updated: 2026-03-02
